userStories.title: AEAT modelos - verify verified=true model responses and endpoint truth contract
acceptanceCriteria: Check whether any AEAT model has explicit verified=true and completeness=completa with casillas_total > 0
Call GET /v1/modelos/aeat/<codigo> for 145, 196, 270, 283, 303
Endpoint must expose verified, completeness, and casillas_total instead of silent nulls
If no verified=true/completa model exists, record HONEST-LIMIT rather than upgrading confidence
Compare source provenance against official AEAT resource URLs already stored for each model
Do not mark any model authoritative unless the explicit completeness contract supports it
userStories.verificationCommand: for C in 145 196 270 283 303; do echo "=== Modelo $C ==="; curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/modelos/aeat/$C | jq '{codigo, verified, completeness, casillas_total}'; done && echo PASS

userStories.title: AEAT modelos - verify parcial and no-casillas-expected responses are honest
acceptanceCriteria: Pick 3 models with completeness=parcial
Pick 3 models with completeness=no-casillas-expected
Parcial responses must include explicit evidence-limited semantics and never invented fields
No-casillas-expected responses must explain that no structured casillas are expected
290 must not claim to describe how to fill the full FATCA form
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/modelos/290 | jq '{verified, completeness, casillas_total}' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/modelos/102 | jq '{verified, completeness}' && echo PASS

userStories.title: BOE legislacion consolidada - verify 5 article queries return correct BOE text
acceptanceCriteria: Query LIVA art.1, LIVA art.4, LGT art.1, LIRPF art.1, LIS art.1
Compare response text against official BOE consolidated text
Check BOE-A identifier and current consolidated version
Flag stale or wrong text before marking pass
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf 'http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/legislacion/LIVA/articulos/1' | jq '{id, boe_referencia, texto: .texto[:200]}' && curl -sf 'http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/legislacion/LGT/articulos/1' | jq '{id, boe_referencia, texto: .texto[:200]}' && echo PASS

userStories.title: BOE search - verify ranked results are legally correct and not contaminated
acceptanceCriteria: Run 5 fiscal/legal search queries
Top results must come from the correct law/domain
No repealed provision is returned as current
Every result must include source_url or boe_referencia
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf 'http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/buscar?q=tipo+impositivo+IVA+general' | jq '.results | {ley, boe_referencia, score}' && echo PASS

userStories.title: BORME - verify heuristic/partial responses are clearly marked as such
acceptanceCriteria: Call BORME endpoint or search for BORME data
Response must include partial/heuristic signal
At least one real BORME document must be returned
BORME data must not bleed into BOE consolidated legislation

userStories.title: EUR-Lex / MiFID II - verify real article content is returned
acceptanceCriteria: MiFID II must return real article content, not metadata_only
CELEX identifier must be 32014L0065
Other EUR-Lex entries without articulado must remain limited
EUR-Lex must not mix with BOE national legislation
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf 'http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/eurlex/buscar?q=MiFID+mercado+instrumentos+financieros' | jq '.results | {celex, titulo, quality}' && echo PASS

userStories.title: DGT doctrina - verify consultas vinculantes return correct traceable data
acceptanceCriteria: Query DGT doctrine by topic or V-number
Each result must have numero_consulta, fecha, organo=DGT
Pick one and verify against official DGT/PETETE source
DGT must not mix with BOE articulado
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf 'http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/doctrina/buscar?q=IVA' | jq '{total: .total, first: .results | {numero_consulta, fecha, organo}}' && echo PASS

userStories.title: CNMV - verify circular/document responses are traceable to official CNMV source
acceptanceCriteria: Call CNMV endpoint for loaded document
Response must include titulo, fecha_publicacion, url_cnmv or boe_referencia
Verify at least one result against cnmv.es
CNMV must not bleed into ESMA or MiCA
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf 'http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/cnmv/buscar?q=circular' | jq '{total: .total, first: .results | {titulo, url_cnmv, fecha}}' && echo PASS

userStories.title: MiCA / ESMA - verify configured_but_unavailable domains respond correctly
acceptanceCriteria: CASP ESMA loaded data must return real rows if present
Empty MiCA tables must return configured_but_unavailable
No MiCA endpoint may substitute unrelated data

userStories.title: AEPD - verify 25 real documents are returned with correct traceable metadata
acceptanceCriteria: AEPD endpoint must expose at least 25 documents
Each sampled document must have titulo, fecha, url_aepd or boe_referencia
Pick one and verify at aepd.es
AEPD must not bleed into BOE legislation

userStories.title: FATCA / CRS - verify evidence_limited responses are honest and traceable
acceptanceCriteria: FATCA queries return official AEAT/BOE/EUR-Lex references if loaded
CRS queries return CRS-related content if loaded
Procedure-complete queries must say evidence_limited when limited
No FATCA or CRS answer may invent filing instructions
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf 'http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/buscar?q=FATCA+cuenta+financiera' | jq '.results | {fuente, quality, boe_referencia}' && echo PASS

userStories.title: Cross-domain contamination check - verify domains do not bleed into each other
acceptanceCriteria: tipo IVA must return LIVA
modelo 303 must return AEAT modelos
circular CNMV must return CNMV
MiFID II articulo 1 must return EUR-Lex
GDPR AEPD must return AEPD or EUR-Lex GDPR
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf 'http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/buscar?q=tipo+IVA+21%25' | jq '[.results[] | {fuente, ley}] | unique_by(.fuente)' && echo PASS

userStories.title: Audit trail - verify query_audit_log captures all Q-01 to Q-12 test calls
acceptanceCriteria: query_audit_log must have entries for calls made during this sprint
Each entry has tool_name or endpoint, input, output_summary, timestamp
Append-only UPDATE attempt must fail
A verified=true call must trace to DB row and official source
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT COUNT(*), MAX(created_at) FROM query_audit_log;" && echo PASS

userStories.title: Observability - confirm 0 FIRING alerts and all workers have recent sync_log
acceptanceCriteria: Alertmanager has 0 FIRING alerts
Prometheus WorkerSilent has no stale workers
Every active worker has sync_log within expected cadence
Fix or document any stale worker
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT worker, MAX(COALESCE(finished_at, started_at)) AS last_run, SUM(errors) AS errors FROM sync_log WHERE COALESCE(finished_at, started_at) > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY worker ORDER BY last_run DESC;" && echo 'Verify no active worker missing' || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Accuracy confidence score - compute and document per domain
acceptanceCriteria: Record queries_tested, correct, honest_limit, incorrect per domain
Any incorrect verified=true answer is a blocker
Write final table to docs/accuracy-report.md
Overall confidence must be >= 95 percent on verified=true answers
userStories.verificationCommand: test -f docs/accuracy-report.md && grep -c '|' docs/accuracy-report.md | grep -vE '^0$' && grep 'incorrect.*' docs/accuracy-report.md | wc -l | grep '^0$' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-INCORRECT-ANSWERS-REMAIN
